dvids.title: Unmanned Operation Center, performs a live fire exercise during BALTOPS 2026
dvids.desc: Unmanned Operation Center (UOC), performs a live fire exercise in Gdynia, Poland during exercise Baltic Operations (BALTOPS 2026).
dvids.unit_name: U.S. Naval Forces Europe-Africa/U.S. Sixth Fleet

dvids.title: U.S. Forces Complete Latest Strikes in Iran
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) forces completed additional self-defense strikes against multiple targets in Iran, June 10, at the Commander in Chief's direction.

dvids.title: U.S. Forces Complete Latest Strikes in Iran
dvids.desc: USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112) launches Tomahawk cruise missiles in support of self-defense strikes against Iran, June 10, 2026. (U.S. Navy Video)

dvids.title: CENTCOM Disables Non-Compliant Vessel in Gulf of Oman
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — At 11:14 p.m. on June 9, U.S. forces disabled an oil tanker in the Gulf of Oman for the second consecutive day after another vessel violated the ongoing blockade by attempting to transport oil from Iran.

dvids.title: CENTCOM Disables Non-Compliant Vessel in Gulf of Oman
dvids.desc: U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) disables Palau-flagged M/T Settebello as it transits the Gulf of Oman, June 9, 2026. (U.S. Central Command Video)
